parsed_review.summary: Claude Code Opus 4.8 max read-only review reported no P0 and no P1 findings. It reported one P2 about blocked_claim_refs declaring synthetic_only while accepting the controlled blocked_claim.* namespace, plus three P3 observations. The P2 is rejected after adjudication because this repo consistently treats blocked_claim.* as the controlled blocked-claim namespace, including S06 correction routes and HermesGate/HumanApproval relationship-map precedents. P3 items are non-blocking and documented for future hardening.

findings.title: blocked_claim_refs synthetic_only label does not require a literal synthetic marker
findings.disposition: Rejected after local adjudication. In this repo, blocked_claim.* is the controlled blocked-claim namespace. S06 correction_route uses blocked_claim.state_enum_registry_ownership_correction, and existing HermesGate/HumanApproval relationship maps use the same controlled blocked_claim.* convention. S07 keeps the same pattern and rejects wrong-prefix claim.* and whitespace cases; no code change is required.

findings.title: Validator reuses expectedStateEnumRegistryMayReference for relationship targets
findings.disposition: Deferred as non-blocking script readability hardening. The dependency is intentional because S07 relationship targets are the S06 may_reference targets, and the validator fails closed on length and item mismatch.

findings.title: Firm-level null matter_id with non-null matterContext is not explicitly unit-tested
findings.disposition: Deferred as non-blocking test hardening. Current tests cover nullable firm-level records, matching matter context, Matter mismatch, and cross-tenant Matter rejection. The untested path is not required for this synthetic relationship-map closeout.

findings.title: Reference-only mutation prohibitions are declarative in this slice
findings.disposition: Not applicable as a code defect. S07 defines the relationship map and pure validator; it performs no writes, gate bypass, or approval actions. Later field registry, transition, and validation helper slices can add stronger runtime composition as needed.
